name: Working construction in West Valley City, sudden loud bang hurt ears—comp eligible?

mainEntity.name: Working construction in West Valley City, sudden loud bang hurt ears—comp eligible?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, acute incidents qualify as accidents under workers' comp, unlike gradual loss.[2][5] File within 1 year.[2] Key factors: Witness bang event, immediate symptoms, audiogram confirms.[5] Report to employer same day, seek medical care.[4] Lawyer handles if disputed as cumulative.[5]
